evals.prompt: I need to add translation support to a new component in libs/common. The component shows a confirmation dialog with the text 'Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?' and a button labelled 'Delete'. The component is a standalone Angular component. Show me: (1) the correct i18n key names to use, (2) how to add the keys to the codebase, (3) how to use them in the template.
evals.expected_output: Keys in flat dot-notation like 'kb.delete.confirm' and 'kb.delete.button'. Instructs to open libs/common/common.babel in BabelEdit (not edit JSON directly). Template uses '| translate' pipe with TranslateModule imported. Interpolation uses {{name}} syntax in the JSON value.

assertions.description: Proposes flat dot-notation keys, not nested JSON objects
Instructs to use BabelEdit via common.babel, not edit JSON files directly
Template uses the 'translate' pipe (not TranslateService.instant in template)
Shows {{name}} double-curly interpolation syntax in JSON value

evals.prompt: A teammate just added a translation key by directly editing libs/common/src/assets/i18n/en.json. They added: "kb.agent.new_task": "New task". The other locale files (es.json, fr.json, ca.json) don't have this key. How do I fix this properly?
evals.expected_output: Open libs/common/common.babel in BabelEdit. The key 'kb.agent.new_task' should already appear (BabelEdit reads the JSON files). Add translations for es, fr, ca — or leave blank to fall back to en. Save from BabelEdit to sync all files. Optionally delete the manual addition and re-add through BabelEdit to avoid future drift.

assertions.description: Identifies that direct JSON editing causes locale files to go out of sync
Recommends opening common.babel in BabelEdit to fix the sync issue
Does NOT say to manually edit es.json / fr.json / ca.json

evals.prompt: In the search-widget (Svelte 5), I need to show the message 'No results found for "{{query}}"'. How do I add this translation and use it in a Svelte component? The widget is in libs/search-widget.
evals.expected_output: Open libs/search-widget/widget.babel in BabelEdit to add the key. Use flat dot-notation like 'search.no_results'. In the Svelte component, import _ from core/i18n and use it as $_("search.no_results", { query }). This is NOT ngx-translate — do not use TranslateModule or TranslateService.

assertions.description: Specifies widget.babel (not common.babel) for the search-widget
Uses _() or translateInstant() from core/i18n, not TranslateService
Does NOT suggest TranslateModule or ngx-translate for the Svelte widget
Uses $_ (store subscription) syntax for reactive translations in the template
